description_long: This object is a small, lifelike bird with a streamlined body and a subtle, earthy coloration. Its plumage is primarily brown with darker mottled patterns along the wings and back, providing excellent camouflage in natural or urban environments. The beak is slender and pointed, ideal for picking insects or seeds. The legs are thin and appear to be a muted grayish color, tucked closely to the body. The tail is straight and tapers to a subtle point, blending seamlessly with the rest of the body. The overall appearance suggests a bird adapted for perching and quick, agile flight.
description: A small, brown bird with mottled plumage, a slender pointed beak, and a straight, tapered tail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's streamlined body, mottled brown plumage, and pointed beak.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow head, symmetrical wings, and the alignment of the beak and body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same streamlined shape and feather pattern as view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the tapered tail and the subtle gradient of the plumage down the back.
attribute_plumage_pattern: mottled with subtle streaks and spots on wings and back
